raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-directed behavioral commitment and boundary-setting declaration",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the speaker has previously occupied the role of emotional surrogate",
    "absorbing or stabilizing others’ chaos is an identifiable, interruptible pattern",
    "emotional content can be 'handed back' as a discrete action",
    "maintaining personal wholeness requires active refusal of external emotional material"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; uses consistent energetic-boundary metaphor across four parallel affirmations",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "speaker experiences measurable depletion from others’ emotional states and the reframing produces observable boundary behavior without impairing necessary empathy or support",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the framing pathologizes ordinary emotional responsiveness, substitutes vague energetic language for concrete relational skills, or justifies emotional withdrawal under the guise of self-protection"
}
